chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. S-40 / 2026 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ DIRECTIONS For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 12.02.2026. Mr. Muhammad Azad Khan, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Imam, Advocate for Respondent No. 4 & 5. ___________________ Mr. Muhammad Imam affected appearance on behalf of Respondent No. 4 & 5 at the very outset states that they will not create any impediment in the Petitioner meeting Respondent No. 6 should she wish to meet the Petitioner. With this observation and undertaking, the instant Petition is disposed of. J U D G E Arshad/
